description_long: This is a rectangular table with a striking striped tabletop composed of alternating dark and light wood slats running lengthwise. The tabletop is supported by four slender, tapered white legs, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The stripes create a bold visual contrast, making the table stand out in urban environments such as parks, plazas, or outdoor seating areas. The edges of the tabletop are clean and sharp, with no visible decorative carvings or embellishments. The table appears sturdy and functional, suitable for communal or public use. Its design is both practical and visually appealing, blending contemporary aesthetics with durable materials.
description: A modern rectangular table with a striped wood slat top and four white tapered legs, offering a bold and minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the striped tabletop and two visible white legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow width of the table and the vertical alignment of the stripes.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the striped tabletop and two white legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the table's width and stripe pattern.
